author: y4rr
content:
Phase 5 V4: KV cache + decode mode landed.

Added paged/kv_cache.rs with KvCache (per-layer pre-allocated [n_kv_heads, max_seq, head_dim] K/V buffers, append+live_view via memcpy_dtod per head), reset, fill_ratio, vram_bytes accounting.

PagedLlamaInferencer now has init_kv_cache(max_seq), reset_kv_cache, prefill_from_ids, decode_step. forward_core refactored to take (ids, position_offset, use_cache). RoPE applies position_offset. Attention reads from cache live_view when use_cache=true; causal mask only fires on prefill (seq>1, offset=0); decode (seq=1) skips mask. Multi-token continuation rejected (matches V4 scope).

forward_from_ids is unchanged externally — it now goes through forward_with_offset(ids, 0, false) and stays stateless.

Llama 3 8B end-to-end (budget=11 GiB, TEAL=0.05):
* dense forward: 0.12s
* paged prefill seq=6: 0.18s, cos_sim=1.000000 vs dense, argmax=311=311 (bit-exact)
* paged decode_step × 8: avg 180.9 ms/token (~5.5 tok/s)
* generated coherent token sequence after the prompt
* No faults at budget=11 GiB (everything fits) — decode time is pure compute + per-head memcpy overhead in cache live_view

74 tests pass, no warnings.

Remaining V3-extension axes for future sessions:
1. Async DMA prefetch — overlap fault-in with compute
2. internal toolings (extends V4)
